title: Another (Epigrams On Windows)
content:
By Satan taught, all conjurors know
    Your mistress in a glass to show,
    And you can do as much:
    In this the devil and you agree;
    None e'er made verses worse than he,
        And thine, I swear, are such.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another (Epigrams On Windows)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
